zh.lifeSummary: Mary de Quincy是Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester和Margaret de Beaumont的女兒，出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾洛賀波洛。她於1219年之前與Sir Hugh le Despenser結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1273年2月3日。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary de Quincy是Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester和Margaret de Beaumont的女儿，出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾洛賀波洛。她于1219年之前与Sir Hugh le Despenser结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1273年2月3日。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Quincy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in France deriving their names from the Gallo-Roman personal name Quintus, meaning ‘fifth(-born)’ + the locative suffix -acum. The earliest bearer of the name in England, that of Saer de Quincy, ancestor of the earls of Winchester, was from Cuinchy in Pas-de-Calais, but the name may have been reinforced by immigrants from Quincy-sous-Sénard in Seine-et-Oise or Quincy-Voisins in Seine-et-Marne. A family of the name de Quincy held the title Earl of Winchester 1207–65. Descendants of this family later bore the name Quincey up to the time of the English essayist Thomas De Quincey (1785–1859), who changed his name from Quincey to De Quincey in 1796.

History: The American Quincy family were established in MA by Edmund Quincy in 1633. Fifth in descent was Josiah Quincy (1744–75), a leading patriot, who was sent to England to argue the colonists’ case in 1774. His son Josiah (1772–1864) was a powerful opponent of slavery, president of Harvard, and mayor of Boston, a post also held by several of his descendants. The traditional pronunciation is “Quinzy”.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Mary de Quincy was born in Loughborough, Leicestershire, England as the daughter of Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester and Margaret de Beaumont. She married Sir Hugh le Despenser before 1219. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 3 February 1273.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary de Quincy est née à Loughborough, Leicestershire, Angleterre, fille de Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester et Margaret de Beaumont. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh le Despenser avant 1219. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 février 1273.

de.lifeSummary: Mary de Quincy wurde in Loughborough, Leicestershire, England, als Tochter von Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester und Margaret de Beaumont geboren. Sie hat vor 1219 Sir Hugh le Despenser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Februar 1273.

it.lifeSummary: Mary de Quincy è nata il nel Loughborough, Leicestershire, England come figlia di Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester e Margaret de Beaumont. Lei sposato Sir Hugh le Despenser prima del 1219. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 3 febbraio 1273.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary de QuincyはイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアロウボロウでSaer de Quincy 1st Earl of WinchesterとMargaret de Beaumontの娘として生まれた。1219年以前にSir Hugh le Despenserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1273年2月3日に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary de Quincy(은)는 영국 레이스스터실르 루그h버루에서 Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester(와)과 Margaret de Beaumont의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1219년 이전 Sir Hugh le Despenser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1273년 2월 3일 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary de Quincy nasceu em Loughborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra filha de Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester e Margaret de Beaumont. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh le Despenser antes 1219. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1273.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary de Quincy родилась в местности лоугбороую, лисестиршир, Англия. Её родителей звали Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester и Margaret de Beaumont. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh le Despenser перед 1219 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 3 февраля 1273 г.

es.lifeSummary: Mary de Quincy nació en Loughborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra como hija de Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester y Margaret de Beaumont. Se casó con Sir Hugh le Despenser antes de 1219. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de febrero de 1273.
